pois.name: Wrangell Cruise Dock
pois.notes: Direct dock in the heart of town. Walking distance to all downtown sights.

pois.name: Petroglyph Beach
pois.notes: Ancient rock carvings on the beach. Short walk north of town. Free viewing.

pois.name: Anan Bear Observatory
pois.notes: Premier black and brown bear viewing at salmon falls. Boat or floatplane access.

pois.name: Chief Shakes Tribal House
pois.notes: Reconstructed Tlingit tribal house on island in harbor. Totem poles.

pois.name: Wrangell Museum
pois.notes: Local history from Tlingit culture through Russian, British, and American eras.

pois.name: Stikine River
pois.notes: Wild river with jet boat tours for glacier and wildlife viewing.

pois.name: Rainbow Falls Trail
pois.notes: Moderate 1-mile trail to scenic waterfall. Trailhead near cruise dock.

pois.name: Wrangell Inner Harbor
pois.notes: Working fishing harbor. Garnet sales by local kids at the dock.

pois.name: Garnet Ledge
pois.notes: Historic garnet mining site on the Stikine River. Kids sell garnets at the dock.

pois.name: Mt. Dewey Trail
pois.notes: Short hike to town overlook. Trailhead behind the museum.
